creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 29 August 2011 15:34, Nicolas Szalay <nico@rottenbytes.info> wrote:
> On Mon, 29 Aug 2011 15:11:57 +0100, Chris Rees <crees@freebsd.org> wrote:
>> I'm really sorry about the delay in my reply... I rewrote a lovely rc
>> script for rabbitmq, then it got lost as I was housekeeping my home
>> dir.
>>
>> Never mind, I've rewritten it again, it's at:
>>
>> http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/new-rabbitmq-rc-script.in
>>
>> Nicolas, if you stick that into the files/ directory of rabbitmq you
>> can make deinstall reinstall and test it.
>
> Works for me. Thx !
>

Thanks. I'll send this to bug-followup because I forgot to include it
the first time...

Chris
